message.content:
| Finding | Statistic | Source Type | N | Confidence Tier |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Exercise reduces depression symptoms | SMD -0.50 | Meta-analysis of RCTs | 14,170 | Irrefutable |
| Weekly religious attendance correlates with lower depression rate | 15.6% vs 20.5% | Large survey | 550,000 | Strong Signal |
| Ex-Jehovah's Witnesses with suicidal ideation | 33% | Small study | 47 | Hypothesis |
| Social media use >3hrs/day associated with depression in adolescents | OR 2.13 | Systematic review of longitudinal studies | 89,000 | Strong Signal |
